members.label: lamp
members.description: white table lamp with fabric shade
members.long_form_open_description: Classic table lamp with a white/off-white tapered fabric shade and a base mostly obscured by nearby objects; positioned on the side table close to the stairs and couch.
members.location_relative_to_other_objects: sits on the side table, between the couch and the potted plant
